title: Uni-Parser: Unified Semantic Parser for Question Answering on Knowledge Base and Database
research_areas: T10 Question Answering, Open-domain question answering, closed-domain question answering, extractive and abstractive QA, multi-hop question answering

T21 Parsing, Tagging, Chunking, Grammar, Syntax, Morphosyntax, Morphology
